text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide (=1) and those not (=0); we hypothesize a positive treatment effect (longer PFS on treatment) in this unselected aggregate analysis.
summary: On treatment_enzalutamide: mean PFS=3.728 (n=20076); off: 3.755 (n=29924); diff=-0.026 months; Welch t-test p=0.1534.

text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_abiraterone (=1) and those not (=0); we hypothesize a positive treatment effect (longer PFS on treatment) in this unselected aggregate analysis.
summary: On treatment_abiraterone: mean PFS=3.740 (n=14991); off: 3.746 (n=35009); diff=-0.006 months; Welch t-test p=0.7757.

text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_docetaxel (=1) and those not (=0); we hypothesize a positive treatment effect (longer PFS on treatment) in this unselected aggregate analysis.
summary: On treatment_docetaxel: mean PFS=3.732 (n=15187); off: 3.749 (n=34813); diff=-0.017 months; Welch t-test p=0.381.

text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_olaparib (=1) and those not (=0); we hypothesize a positive treatment effect (longer PFS on treatment) in this unselected aggregate analysis.
summary: On treatment_olaparib: mean PFS=3.829 (n=5098); off: 3.735 (n=44902); diff=+0.094 months; Welch t-test p=0.003294.

text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma (=1) and those not (=0); we hypothesize a positive treatment effect (longer PFS on treatment) in this unselected aggregate analysis.
summary: On treatment_lu177_psma: mean PFS=3.741 (n=7504); off: 3.745 (n=42496); diff=-0.004 months; Welch t-test p=0.8723.

text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab (=1) and those not (=0); we hypothesize a positive treatment effect (longer PFS on treatment) in this unselected aggregate analysis.
summary: On treatment_pembrolizumab: mean PFS=3.805 (n=2384); off: 3.741 (n=47616); diff=+0.064 months; Welch t-test p=0.1369.

text: The PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib is greater (more positive) in brca2_mutation=1 patients than in brca2_mutation=0 patients (positive interaction; PARP inhibitors target HR-deficient disease).
summary: BRCA2+ subgroup olaparib effect=+1.545 mo (p=3.95e-27); BRCA2- subgroup olaparib effect=-0.073 mo (p=0.0191); interaction coef=+1.619 (p=4.33e-61).

text: The PFS benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is greater (more positive) in msi_high=1 patients than in msi_high=0 patients (positive interaction; PD-1 blockade benefits MSI-high tumors).
summary: MSI-high subgroup pembrolizumab effect=-0.265 mo (p=0.239); MSS subgroup effect=+0.075 mo (p=0.0864); interaction coef=-0.340 (p=0.153).

text: The PFS benefit of treatment_lu177_psma is greater (more positive) in psma_high=1 patients than in psma_high=0 patients (positive interaction; the radioligand depends on PSMA expression).
summary: PSMA-high subgroup lu177 effect=-0.011 mo (p=0.736); PSMA-low subgroup effect=+0.006 mo (p=0.874); interaction coef=-0.017 (p=0.737).

text: The PFS effect of treatment_enzalutamide is more negative in ar_v7_positive=1 patients than in ar_v7_positive=0 patients (negative interaction; AR-V7 splice variant confers resistance to AR-targeted therapy).
summary: AR-V7+ subgroup enzalutamide effect=-0.024 mo (p=0.557); AR-V7- subgroup effect=-0.027 mo (p=0.193); interaction coef=+0.002 (p=0.957).

text: The PFS effect of treatment_abiraterone is more negative in ar_v7_positive=1 patients than in ar_v7_positive=0 patients (negative interaction).
summary: AR-V7+ abi effect=+0.032 mo (p=0.469); AR-V7- abi effect=-0.015 mo (p=0.49); interaction coef=+0.048 (p=0.334).

text: brca2_mutation=1 patients have different mean pfs_months than brca2_mutation=0 patients (direction unclear unadjusted: aggressive HR-deficient biology vs olaparib responders).
summary: brca2_mutation+ mean=3.835 (n=4996); brca2_mutation- mean=3.734 (n=45004); diff=+0.100; Welch p=0.00205.

text: ar_v7_positive=1 patients have shorter pfs_months than ar_v7_positive=0 because the splice variant marks treatment-refractory disease.
summary: ar_v7_positive+ mean=3.734 (n=10038); ar_v7_positive- mean=3.747 (n=39962); diff=-0.013; Welch p=0.58.

text: msi_high=1 patients have different pfs_months than msi_high=0 patients (direction uncertain in unadjusted comparison).
summary: msi_high+ mean=3.778 (n=1528); msi_high- mean=3.743 (n=48472); diff=+0.035; Welch p=0.515.

text: psma_high=1 patients have different pfs_months than psma_high=0 patients.
summary: psma_high+ mean=3.752 (n=29962); psma_high- mean=3.732 (n=20038); diff=+0.020; Welch p=0.273.

text: Patients with mcrpc=1 have shorter pfs_months than mcrpc=0 patients.

text: psa_ng_ml modifies treatment_lu177_psma effect (interaction; uncertain direction — high PSA marks burden but also more PSMA target).
treatment_docetaxel benefit is greater (more positive) in visceral_mets=1 patients (positive interaction).
treatment_olaparib effect differs by tp53_mutation status (interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab effect differs by tp53_mutation status (interaction).
treatment_enzalutamide effect is more negative in tp53_mutation=1 patients (interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab effect differs by ar_v7_positive (exploratory interaction).

In the BRCA2-positive subgroup, treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months relative to no olaparib.
summary: BRCA2-positive: olaparib effect=+1.545 mo (n_tx=529, n_ctrl=4467); p=3.95e-27.

text: In the BRCA2-negative subgroup, treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months relative to no olaparib.
summary: BRCA2-negative: olaparib effect=-0.073 mo (n_tx=4569, n_ctrl=40435); p=0.0191.

text: In the MSI-high subgroup, treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months relative to no pembrolizumab.
summary: MSI-high: pembrolizumab effect=-0.265 mo (n_tx=79, n_ctrl=1449); p=0.239.

text: In the MSS subgroup, treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months relative to no pembrolizumab.
summary: MSS: pembrolizumab effect=+0.075 mo (n_tx=2305, n_ctrl=46167); p=0.0864.

text: In the PSMA-high subgroup, treatment_lu177_psma improves pfs_months relative to no lu177-PSMA.
summary: PSMA-high: lu177 effect=-0.011 mo (n_tx=4486, n_ctrl=25476); p=0.736.

text: In the PSMA-low subgroup, treatment_lu177_psma improves pfs_months relative to no lu177-PSMA.
summary: PSMA-low: lu177 effect=+0.006 mo (n_tx=3018, n_ctrl=17020); p=0.874.

text: In the AR-V7-positive subgroup, treatment_enzalutamide changes pfs_months: hypothesized no benefit / negative.
summary: AR-V7-positive: enzalutamide effect=-0.024 mo (n_tx=4019, n_ctrl=6019); p=0.557.

text: In the AR-V7-negative subgroup, treatment_enzalutamide changes pfs_months: hypothesized positive benefit.
summary: AR-V7-negative: enzalutamide effect=-0.027 mo (n_tx=16057, n_ctrl=23905); p=0.193.

text: A composite symptom-burden score (fatigue_grade + pain_nrs/2 + dyspnea_grade + cough_grade + appetite_loss_grade) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
summary: OLS slope on symptom_burden: beta=+8.252e-05; p=0.981.

text: Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) reduces the PFS benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab (negative interaction; high NLR is a known biomarker of poor immunotherapy response).
Higher crp_mg_l reduces the PFS benefit of treatment_docetaxel (negative interaction; high inflammation marks poor chemo tolerance).
The PFS effect of treatment_docetaxel depends on age_years (interaction). Hypothesized: more negative interaction for docetaxel (chemo less tolerated in older patients).

The PFS effect of treatment_pembrolizumab depends on age_years (interaction). Hypothesized: more negative interaction for docetaxel (chemo less tolerated in older patients).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with greater PFS benefit of treatment_docetaxel (positive interaction; better-nourished patients derive more benefit).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with greater PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib (positive interaction; better-nourished patients derive more benefit).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with greater PFS benefit of treatment_lu177_psma (positive interaction; better-nourished patients derive more benefit).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with greater PFS benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab (positive interaction; better-nourished patients derive more benefit).
BRCA2 and TP53 co-mutation interact such that double-positive patients have especially short pfs_months (negative interaction).
tp53_mutation and pten_loss interact such that double-positive patients have especially short pfs_months (negative interaction).
ar_v7_positive and tp53_mutation interact (negative interaction).

Final refined hypothesis: in the fully-adjusted multivariable model with all four predictive biomarker × treatment interactions included simultaneously, treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction is positive and significant.
